results.title: Restate AI Examples
results.description: Runnable examples showcasing AI workflows and durable agents using Restate for resilience, state persistence, retries, and observability.

results.title: Agentic Flow
results.description: An AI agent framework that combines ultra-fast code operations, persistent learning memory, and multi-model optimization to create agents that get smarter and faster with every run.

results.title: Functional Agent Framework
results.description: A purely functional AI agent framework built on immutable state, type safety, and composable policies, enabling production-ready AI agent systems with built-in security, observability, and error handling.

results.title: AI Nexus
results.description: AI Nexus provides a ReAct-style agent with a tool for saving memories, enabling agents to persist and reuse important information across conversational threads, scoped by user ID.

results.title: AgentHelm
results.description: AgentHelm is an AI agent framework that provides database-style transactional safety guarantees, including automatic rollbacks and human-in-the-loop approvals, to prevent failures and ensure consistent state in production environments.

results.title: AI Workbench Agentic RAG Example
results.description: Agentic RAG enhances Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with an agentic layer for routing, evaluation, and iteration, allowing for web search integration and hallucination control.

results.title: 500+ AI Agent Projects
results.description: A curated collection of AI agent use cases across industries, showcasing practical applications and linking to open-source projects for implementation.

results.title: Fingerprint JavaScript Agent
results.description: The Fingerprint JavaScript agent is a high-performance JavaScript function that collects multiple device and browser signals and sends them to the Fingerprint Platform API for visitor identification and device intelligence analysis.

results.title: Apollo AI Agent Framework
results.description: The Apollo AI Agent Framework is a flexible, multi-provider AI agent framework designed for crypto analysis, featuring customizable personalities, persistent memory, real-time market analysis, and a collaborative HIVE intelligence system.

results.title: Browser-Agent
results.description: An AI agent for browser automation and web testing using Playwright, compliant with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

results.title: Micro Agent
results.description: An AI agent that writes and fixes code by generating tests and iterating until all test cases pass, focusing on a single, well-defined task.

results.title: Agent-Gear
results.description: Agent-Gear provides high-performance filesystem operations for AI agents, featuring stateful indexing, batch I/O, parallel grep search, atomic/fast writes, large file support, and async APIs, all powered by Rust.

results.title: Strands Agent Builder
results.description: Strands Agent Builder is an interactive toolkit for building, testing, and extending AI agents and tools with a model-driven approach, featuring a CLI and integrated tools.

results.title: Mixture of Agents Model
results.description: Implements a Mixture of Agents (MoA) model using Gemini Pro 1.5, GPT-4o, and Claude Sonnet 3.5 for enhanced LLM reasoning and language generation through multi-layer processing and specialized agent roles.

results.title: AgentPrism
results.description: AgentPrism provides React components for visualizing traces from AI agents, displaying LLM calls, tool executions, and agent workflows in a hierarchical timeline.

results.title: Temporal AI Agent
results.description: A Temporal-based AI agent that conducts multi-turn conversations to achieve goals by executing native and MCP tools, supporting single and multi-agent modes.

results.title: Dot Agent
results.description: A TypeScript library and CLI tool for parsing, validating, and discovering AI agent files with standardized YAML frontmatter metadata, featuring schema validation, agent discovery, and version management.

results.title: AgentOps
results.description: AgentOps is a developer-favorite platform for testing, debugging, deploying, and monitoring AI agents and LLM applications with minimal code.

results.title: A* Pathfinding Project
results.description: A comprehensive pathfinding solution for games and simulations, providing advanced algorithms for agent movement, local avoidance, and graph generation, including support for Grid and Navmesh graphs.

results.title: A-MEM
results.description: Agentic Memory is a novel system for LLM agents that dynamically organizes memories using Zettelkasten principles and ChromaDB for intelligent indexing and linking.

results.title: Dapr Agents
results.description: Dapr Agents is a framework for building production-grade, resilient AI agent systems that leverage LLMs, Dapr's workflow engine for guaranteed task completion, and efficient, scalable multi-agent collaboration.

results.title: Agents Platform Agent WebSockets
results.description: Establish a WebSocket connection for real-time conversations with an AI agent.

results.title: Cloudflare Agents
results.description: Cloudflare Agents provides a framework for building intelligent, stateful AI agents that persist, think, and evolve at the edge of the network, supporting real-time communication and autonomous operation.

results.title: Agent Client Protocol
results.description: The Agent Client Protocol (ACP) defines a standard, flexible, and platform-agnostic interface for real-time communication between AI agents and client applications, addressing UX challenges in AI interactions.

results.title: Elastic APM .NET Agent
results.description: The Elastic APM .NET Agent provides automatic instrumentation for .NET applications, enabling performance monitoring and error tracking by reporting data to the APM Server.

results.title: AgentEval
results.description: Readymade evaluators for agent trajectories

results.title: RAG Agent
results.description: Learn how to build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Agent using the AI SDK and Next.js to provide LLMs with specific, relevant information beyond their training data.

results.title: Redis Agent Memory Server
results.description: A Redis-powered memory server for AI agents, managing conversational context and long-term memories with semantic search, summarization, and REST/MCP APIs.

results.title: Agent Communication Protocol
results.description: Agent Communication Protocol

results.title: Agentica
results.description: Agentica is an AI function calling framework that simplifies AI agent development by allowing you to define agents using TypeScript classes, Swagger/OpenAPI documents, or MCP servers.
